title: Sing A New Song to Jehovah

verses.text: Sing a new song to Jehovah for the wonders he has wrought; his right hand and arm most holy triumph to his cause have brought. In his love and tender mercy he has made salvation known, in the sight of ev'ry nation he his righteousness has shown.

Truth and mercy toward his people he has ever kept in mind, and his full and free salvation he has shown to all mankind. Sing, O earth, sing, to Jehovah, praises to Jehovah sing; with the swelling notes of music shout before the Lord, the King.

Seas with all your fullness thunder, all earth's peoples now rejoice; floods and hills in praise uniting, to the Lord lift up your voice. For, behold, the Lord is coming, robed in justice and in might; he alone will judge the nations, and his judgment shall be right.
